description: A core_ordering_sequence Mystery Chamber instance (infinite_stacks.md S10, S24.4) mid-solve: one object inspected, a private clue not yet shared, two shared notes (one marked contradiction), one hint spent, and a 3-slot ordering submission. Wire shape for state.puzzle (core/selectors.js selectPuzzleView).

objects.label: Dated receipt
objects.description: Stamped the 4th of Ember -- reliably the middle delivery.

objects.label: Delivery manifest
objects.description: Lists the crates in strict arrival order, one entry torn away.

private_clue.text: Only you saw the courier arrive before the storm broke.

shared_notes.text: The crate marked with a crescent moon arrived first.
The overwritten label actually names the LAST crate, not the first.

tiers.description: Focuses attention on the delivery manifest without removing choices.
Explains the relationship between the manifest and the overwritten label.
Reveals the next valid operation, not the final answer.

hints.force_progress_consequence: Accept a broken lock and a closed route to the storeroom.
